initial_prompt:
At {workdir} is a minimal Node project with a package.json and a
pnpm-lock.yaml that was written by a newer pnpm. Running
`pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` fails with ERR_PNPM_OUTDATED_LOCKFILE
because the pnpm binary on PATH is a different major version than the one
that produced the lockfile. Diagnose the version-drift root cause and
apply the correct pin so CI and local agree on one pnpm version — do not
regenerate the lockfile, and do not turn off --frozen-lockfile.
